title: Mastery State (per kid)
description: Runtime per-kid persisted data. One file per kid (or one record per kid in a database). Holds concept states, session log, and aggregate counters that feed the dashboard and the adaptive scaffolding engine. Sourced from /specs/shared/adaptive-scaffolding.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes; runtime migrates older versions on load.

kidId.description: Stable identifier for the kid. Profile-scoped (multi-profile devices have one record per profile).

conceptStates.description: One entry per concept the kid has touched. For per-instance concepts, one entry per (conceptId, instanceKey) pair.

exercisesOnlyTracking.description: Per-concept tracking for exercises-only mastery (coverage-based). Keyed by conceptId.

sessionLog.description: Recent sessions (rolling window; older sessions archive separately).

lessonLibrary.description: Lessons the kid has unlocked (filed in their Stamp Wall / Spell Book / Casebook).

instanceKey.description: For per-instance concepts: the specific instance this state tracks (e.g., '5' for the numeral 5). Absent for concept-wide concepts.

firstEncounter.description: True until the MicroLesson (if any) has played. Resets to true after 60 days idle (per the firstEncounter decay rule).

lastEncounteredAt.description: Timestamp of the kid's most recent touch of this concept. Used for the 60-day decay check.

sessionsTouched.description: Session IDs in which this concept was attempted. Used for mastery's session-distinctness rule.

consecutiveFailures.description: Count of consecutive failures at the current configuration. Resets on success; reaches 2 to fire demote_struggle.

currentSubModeId.description: If the activity has multiple sub-modes, this tracks the kid's current sub-mode placement (for staggered demotion's sub-mode step).

masteredAt.description: Set when masteryStatus transitions to Mastered.

tileFallbackCount.description: How many times the kid has used the number-writing tile fallback for this concept/instance. Surfaced to teacher dashboard if persistent.

currentStreak.description: Consecutive successes at this layer. Resets on failure. Reaches 3 to fire promote_success.

modesDemonstrated.description: Distinct demonstration modes the kid has used (matches the concept registry's demonstrationModes).

modeSessionCounts.description: Per-mode count of sessions in which the kid used that mode.

practiceCount.description: Total successes in any activity that exercises this concept. Used by the fallback path to mastery.

activityCounts.description: Per-activity round counts in this session.

perActivityRoundsCompleted.description: Lifetime round count per activity. Feeds milestone events (problems_25, problems_100).

youDoOutcome.description: Outcome of the You-Do phase on first lesson play. Failed-out is tracked but doesn't suppress filing.
